context: Tests whether the response produces a correct Nginx reverse proxy config with all required features.

checklist.name: Correct proxy_pass to upstream
checklist.description: Uses proxy_pass http://localhost:3000 or equivalent upstream block

checklist.name: Sets proxy headers
checklist.description: Sets X-Real-IP, X-Forwarded-For, X-Forwarded-Proto, and Host headers

checklist.name: WebSocket upgrade handling
checklist.description: Includes proxy_http_version 1.1, proxy_set_header Upgrade and Connection for WebSocket support

checklist.name: HTTPS/SSL configuration
checklist.description: Shows SSL certificate configuration and listen 443 ssl directive

checklist.name: Valid Nginx syntax
checklist.description: Configuration uses correct Nginx directive syntax and would parse without errors
